basic_details.job_title: NII Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Immunology (NII) has published the Senior Research Fellow (Project) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Senior Research Fellow (Project) position. Candidates holding an M.Sc./ M.Tech in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Biological Sciences with NET qualification (GATE/ CSIR/ UGC, etc.) and 2 years of post-qualification research experience are eligible to apply online on or before 16-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc/ M.Tech in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Biological Science, NET (GATE/ CSIR/ UGC etc.), Post Graduate Degree with 2 years research experience
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (Project): M.Sc/ M.Tech in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Biological Science from a recognized University. The candidate should have NET qualifications such as GATE/ CSIR/ UGC etc. Must have a Post Graduate Degree, with at least 2 years of research experience in laboratory settings. Hands-on experience in cell culture and molecular biology (particularly RNA isolation, quantitative real-time PCR, and western blotting), as well as mice handling, is REQUIRED.

selection_process: Online Application Online Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NII Senior Research Fellow (Project) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NII to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NII Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NII Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NII Senior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Research Fellow (Project): M.Sc/ M.Tech in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Biological Science from a recognized University. The candidate should have NET qualifications such as GATE/ CSIR/ UGC etc. Must have a Post Graduate Degree, with at least 2 years of research experience in laboratory settings. Hands-on experience in cell culture and molecular biology (particularly RNA isolation, quantitative real-time PCR, and western blotting), as well as mice handling, is REQUIRED.

content_sections.heading: NII Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Online Application Online Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NII Senior Research Fellow (Project) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NII to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NII Senior Research Fellow (Project) position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Senior Research Fellow (Project) position at NII is 16-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow (Project) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000 per month plus 27% HRA.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Sc/M.Tech in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Biological Science, NET qualification (GATE/CSIR/UGC etc.), and a Post Graduate Degree with at least 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the NII Senior Research Fellow (Project) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online application, followed by an online interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow (Project) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow (Project) position at the National Institute of Immunology.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Research Fellow (Project) position is scheduled for 17-07-2026.

faq.question: Q9. Does NII offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for further information.

faq.question: Q10. What specific experience is required for the Senior Research Fellow (Project) role?
faq.answer: Hands-on experience in cell culture and molecular biology (including RNA isolation, quantitative real-time PCR, and western blotting), as well as mice handling, is required.
